parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: records_per_page
parameters.description: Number of records on each page, up to 200. Default 50.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Restrictions on the trade records (see RecordFilters schema). Default None. Possible filters: time (required within filters, frame ≤ 90 days), amount, cardholder, merchant_id, record_status, rec_trade_id, order_number, bank_transaction_id, auth_code, currency, tsp, card_identifier.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Criteria for ordering. Default attribute = time, is_descending = true. Contains attribute (String: "time" or "amount") and is_descending (boolean).

request.description: JSON body. Header x-api-key. Retrieve trade records with filters/paging (time filter required, frame ≤ 90 days)

responses.description: Trade records JSON; status=2 indicates end of list. HTTP status not stated by source (200 assumed).

missing: trade_records array element structure not detailed in source
